hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null && git fetch origin --prune 2>/dev/null && { behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null || echo 0); ahead=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); branch=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$behind" -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠ Branch $branch is $behind commit(s) behind origin. Run ./scripts/sync.sh to pull latest before editing."; elif [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ]; then echo "ℹ Branch $branch is $ahead commit(s) ahead of origin (local work not yet pushed)."; else echo "✓ Branch $branch is in sync with origin."; fi; } || true'
